'''âg-n-h-j''' ('''kaganhejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:monetize|monetize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-n-h-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:monetize|monetize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âg-n-h-j
|-
! Lemma
| kaganhejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiganhejoko|thiganhejoko]] || [[word:jiganhejoko|jiganhejoko]] || [[word:shiganhejoko|shiganhejoko]] || [[word:kiganhejoko|kiganhejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuganhejoko|thuthuganhejoko]] || [[word:jujuganhejoko|jujuganhejoko]] || [[word:shushuganhejoko|shushuganhejoko]] || [[word:kukuganhejoko|kukuganhejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuganhejoko|thuganhejoko]] || [[word:juganhejoko|juganhejoko]] || [[word:shuganhejoko|shuganhejoko]] || [[word:kuganhejoko|kuganhejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuganhejoko|thuganhejoko]] || [[word:juganhejoko|juganhejoko]] || [[word:shuganhejoko|shuganhejoko]] || [[word:kuganhejoko|kuganhejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theganhejoko|theganhejoko]] || [[word:jeganhejoko|jeganhejoko]] || [[word:sheganhejoko|sheganhejoko]] || [[word:keganhejoko|keganhejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoganhejoko|thothoganhejoko]] || [[word:jojoganhejoko|jojoganhejoko]] || [[word:shoshoganhejoko|shoshoganhejoko]] || [[word:kokoganhejoko|kokoganhejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoganhejoko|thoganhejoko]] || [[word:joganhejoko|joganhejoko]] || [[word:shoganhejoko|shoganhejoko]] || [[word:koganhejoko|koganhejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoganhejoko|thoganhejoko]] || [[word:joganhejoko|joganhejoko]] || [[word:shoganhejoko|shoganhejoko]] || [[word:koganhejoko|koganhejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠganhejoko|thĂŠganhejoko]] || [[word:jĂŠganhejoko|jĂŠganhejoko]] || [[word:shĂŠganhejoko|shĂŠganhejoko]] || [[word:kĂŠganhejoko|kĂŠganhejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathaganhejoko|thathaganhejoko]] || [[word:jajaganhejoko|jajaganhejoko]] || [[word:shashaganhejoko|shashaganhejoko]] || [[word:kakaganhejoko|kakaganhejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thaganhejoko|thaganhejoko]] || [[word:jaganhejoko|jaganhejoko]] || [[word:shaganhejoko|shaganhejoko]] || [[word:kaganhejoko|kaganhejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thaganhejoko|thaganhejoko]] || [[word:jaganhejoko|jaganhejoko]] || [[word:shaganhejoko|shaganhejoko]] || [[word:kaganhejoko|kaganhejoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shaganhejithi|shaganhejithi]] || [[word:shaganhejiji|shaganhejiji]] || [[word:shaganhejishi|shaganhejishi]] || [[word:shaganhejiki|shaganhejiki]]
|-

|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:shaganhejĂŻf|shaganhejĂŻf]] || [[word:shaganhejĂŻf|shaganhejĂŻf]] || [[word:shaganhejĂŻf|shaganhejĂŻf]] || [[word:shaganhejĂŻf|shaganhejĂŻf]]

|-

|-

|-
